title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
